name: 10k-agent-ramp
description: Scale cliff stress test: ramp to 10K agents over 5 minutes, hold for 30 minutes. Validates gateway concurrency budget and NATS backpressure under realistic sustained load. This is the primary test for the 10K scale target.

notes.purpose: Stress test before scale cliff at 10K endpoints
notes.memory_budget: 10K agents x ~1KB gRPC stream state = ~10MB gateway overhead
notes.failure_mode: If gateway OOMs or NATS backpressure causes drops > 0.01%, test fails
